summary: Iteration 5: verified image edit controls in Gestisci prodotti edit dialog + no-limit product/catalog listing. Backend 16/16 pytest cases passed (incl. regression). Frontend Playwright E2E covering placeholder->upload->save->image visible->reopen->remove->save->placeholder, all passed.

issues: React a11y warning: DialogContent missing Description / aria-describedby (non-blocking, appeared in console).

critical_code_review_comments: ProductManage.jsx: PUT /products/{id} sends the entire editing object incl. created_at/updated_at/user_id/id — Pydantic ProductIn ignores extras so safe, but consider whitelisting fields client-side.
list_products/list_catalogs correctly use to_list(length=None); consider paginated responses for future scalability instead of unbounded loads.
Image edit input is reset via e.target.value = '' after upload — good, allows re-selecting same file.
Minor a11y: add DialogDescription to Modifica prodotto dialog to silence Radix warning.
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_UI_NoImg_* product for image edit flow test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 5 verified: (1) edit-image-preview appears only when product has image_path; (2) edit-image-upload input triggers POST /api/upload and updates preview; (3) 'Aggiungi immagine' text shown for image-less products, 'Cambia immagine' after; (4) edit-image-remove clears image_path client-side; (5) Save persists via PUT /api/products/{id} with image_path (path or null); (6) product-card-{id} img appears/disappears accordingly; (7) Excel hint text 'Utile per prodotti importati da Excel senza immagine' present; (8) backend to_list(length=None) verified for products and catalogs.
